mnemonics: EXPLORE: Examine, X-ray, Plot, Look, Organize, Review, Explain
keyPoints: Understand the data's structure, quality, and patterns before formal modeling.
Use summary statistics and visualizations to generate hypotheses and guide further analysis.
Detect outliers, missing values, and anomalies that could impact model performance.
commonMistakes: Jumping straight to complex models without first understanding the basic properties of the data.
Ignoring the context of the data and misinterpreting correlations as causations.
Failing to properly handle missing data or outliers, leading to biased results.
